hero.tagline: Halal Indian & Pakistani fire in the heart of Milan.

story.lead: A small, well-appointed room. Clean plates. Friendly faces. Recipes that travel from the subcontinent to Viale Toscana — without losing the heat.
story.body: Shalimar is Milan's Halal Indian & Pakistani table: tandoori chicken, biryani, fresh naan, and chai that tastes like memory. Come hungry. Leave wanting one more bite.

tandoori.name: Tandoori Chicken
tandoori.blurb: Marinated overnight, kissed by charcoal heat — the dish guests come back for.

biryani.name: Royal Biryani
biryani.blurb: Saffron rice, tender meat, whole spices — a celebration on a plate.

curry.name: House Curries
curry.blurb: Not particularly spicy unless you ask — rich, balanced, deeply aromatic.

naan.name: Fresh Naan
naan.blurb: Soft, blistered, best torn by hand and dragged through every sauce.

thali.name: Thali Spreads
thali.blurb: A constellation of flavors — meat, veg, dal, rice, and sweets in one sitting.

atmosphere.lead: Comfortable chairs. Attentive service. The kind of place that feels like home while you're away from home.

reserve.lead: Lunch or dinner — we'll hold a table. Prefer to call?
reserve.name: Name
reserve.sentBody: Grazie, {{name}}. We'll confirm your table shortly.

footer.credit: Made for spice seekers in Milano

menu.title: The Menu
menu.subtitle: A display of our kitchen — ask our staff for today's specials.
menu.qrSubtitle: Full carta with prices · Halal Indian & Pakistani
menu.allergenReg: Regolamento CE 852/2004 e D.G.R. 1105/2013 Reg. Lombardia
menu.allergenIntro: Dear Customer, if you suffer from ALLERGIES or FOOD INTOLERANCE please ask our staff for information. In any case, it is impossible to safeguard that the food served here has not come into contact with the following allergens:
menu.pickChapter: Pick a chapter. Short pages. No endless scroll.
